title: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
summary_full: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.
summary_public: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.

IR.label: neutral
